goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion 状态迁移协议预览

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary 状态迁移预览
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-transition.ts 只读 CLI/函数和 focused tests。它读取 catty_memory_canaries 队列与 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions 审计记录，把 persisted promotable decision 映射为 planned -> promotable，把 persisted blocked decision 映射为 planned -> blocked；同时在 protocol 中声明后续 promotable -> promoted 需要的证据和 side effect。src/catty/README.md 同步新增入口、运行命令和边界说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经具备 canary queue、canary eval、promotion preview、promotion decision 写入和只读 report，但 canary status 仍只有 planned，缺少真实状态推进前的协议层。本轮先把转正状态机做成可审计 dry-run，帮助后续实现真实 status update / memory promotion 时不把评估、审计和用户长期 memory 写入混在一起。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion 状态迁移协议预览

decisions.chose: 只做状态迁移协议预览，不更新 catty_memory_canaries.status、不写 catty_memory_audit、不写用户长期 memory、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: Catty v0 需要先把 planned -> promotable/blocked/promoted 的证据和 side effect 讲清楚，再允许任何真实 mutation。

decisions.chose: 以 persisted promotion decisions 为状态迁移证据，而不是重新运行 canary eval 或 promotion preview。
decisions.rationale: decision audit 是状态推进前的稳定审计层；transition preview 只解释已有决策，不产生第二套判准。

decisions.point: 无 decision 的 canary 行为
decisions.chose: 保持 planned，并输出 wait_for_decision 和所需 evidence。
decisions.rationale: 缺少 decision 不是失败，也不是可转正；把等待状态显式化能避免 runner 误推进。

decisions.chose: 把既有 Catty proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 前序 intents 分别完成 trail、judge、store、shadow CLI、candidate、canary queue/eval、promotion preview、decision write 和 report；本轮只在其后补 transition preview，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 本轮直接扩展 catty_memory_canaries.status schema 并写入 promotable/blocked/promoted
rejected.reason: 这会把协议预览和真实 mutation 混在一起，也会越过当前 v0 的审计边界。

rejected.alternative: promotable 时直接写用户长期 memory
rejected.reason: 真实 user memory promotion 需要独立 writer、用户授权和 audit evidence；本轮只定义后续 promoted 需要什么。

rejected.alternative: 把 transition 接入 heartbeat 或 nightly runner
rejected.reason: 调度会扩大运行态边界；本轮保持手动只读 CLI。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 新增 transition preview 只读 Catty canary/decision 表，不写用户长期 memory。
没有新增模型调用路径，也没有接 launchd heartbeat 或 nightly runner。
既有 CLAUDE.md dirty 未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该边界。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-transition.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-canary-promotion-transition 模块。
验证通过：focused transition test 2 pass，24 expect。
验证通过：promotion 相关 tests 10 pass，87 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 38 pass，250 expect。
验证通过：bun test 43 pass，264 expect。
CLI smoke：--help 输出 usage；live dry-run 返回 empty transitions 和 planned/promotable/blocked/promoted protocol，未写 live DB。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline ok/throttled。
提交 1872957 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-transition.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-transition.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promotion transition preview
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a read-only transition protocol layer after durable promotion decisions and before any real canary status mutation.
Transition preview treats persisted promotion decisions as the only status-transition evidence source.
The planned -> promotable and planned -> blocked transitions are explicit, while promotable -> promoted is documented as a separate future writer requiring user memory and audit side effects.
The slice preserves separation between canary dogfood evidence, promotion decision audit, status transition protocol, and true user-prior memory promotion.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-transition.ts emits a dry-run transition preview for the live Catty store by default.
Queued canaries with persisted promotable decisions return action=mark_promotable and proposedStatus=promotable.
Queued canaries with persisted blocked decisions return action=mark_blocked and proposedStatus=blocked.
Queued canaries without persisted decisions return action=wait_for_decision and remain planned.
The command lists required evidence, sideEffectsIfApplied, forbiddenSideEffects, and the downstream promotable -> promoted protocol.
security_implications: The command reads only Catty canary queue and promotion decision audit tables through existing read-only helpers.
The command does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, provider env vars, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or secrets.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command writes no user memory, no catty_memory_audit, no canary status, and no schema during empty-state reads.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the transition preview is a read-only layer over existing additive tables.
Current catty_memory_canaries status remains planned-only; real promotable/blocked/promoted status writes remain a future slice.
